name: Pizza Potato Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until tender.
2. Drain the potatoes, then add milk and butter. Mash until smooth.
3. Stir in chopped chives. Let cool slightly.
4. Shape into 4 cakes about 5 inches in diameter.
5. Lightly dust with plain flour.
6. Heat vegetable oil in a large, heavy-based pan.
7. Fry potato cakes for 5 minutes on each side until crisp and golden.
8. Arrange sliced tomatoes, cubed mozzarella, sun-dried tomatoes over each cake.
9. Sprinkle grated red Leicester cheese and half the oregano over each.
10. Season with ground black pepper.
11. Drizzle remaining oil over the cakes.
12. Place pan under a hot grill for about 5 minutes until toppings are warmed through.
13. Finish by sprinkling the remaining oregano on top to serve.
